name: Grace, Valerie & Abby || Free Kittens
description:
Three demi-human sisters, Grace, Valerie and Abby, raised in a demi-human breeding center, are put up for free adoption as a set. Because they are perceived as defective the demi-human breeding center where they have always lived has cut resources for their care, and due to their age, they are now more of a burden than a potential source of income for the facility.

/ᐠ. ｡.ᐟ\ᵐᵉᵒʷˎˊ˗

⚠️⚠️Warning⚠️⚠️

I apologize in advance for any bad experiences you may have or have already had

Due to the feedback received regarding the bot's performance with JLLM, I decided to remove certain aspects of the bot's definition in order to reduce the permanent token count.

However, when playing, keep in mind that this bot is very token-heavy. I do not recommend using it with JLLM because the response time can be extremely high (between 1´40 and 2´00 minutes or more, according to my tests) or you might not get one at all... (I´m sorry 😭)

Furthermore, due to the number of tokens already in context, the quality of the role-playing would degrade quickly, not to mention other variables such as the tokens in the persona´s definition and the custom prompts.

With this I don't mean to discourage you from using the bot if you don't have access to alternatives to JLLM, I just wanted to be honest about what you can expect and what might prevent you from having a good experience.
